hero.title: Limonaia Villa Aurora
hero.subtitle: A private limonaia reborn as a serene retreat — light-filled rooms, gardens, and the quiet rhythm of the hills beyond the city.
hero.altImg: Limonaia Villa Aurora — exterior at golden hour

about.title: A residence, not a hotel
about.body: Every corner is composed for slow mornings and unhurried evenings — a private world minutes from Florence, anchored in Tuscan craft and modern ease.

light.title: Light & volume
light.body: Tall windows frame the garden; plaster walls breathe with the day.

craft.title: Crafted calm
craft.body: Materials chosen for touch — stone, oak, linen, and still air.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Swipe through moments of the villa — interiors, light, and the garden in quiet motion.

availability.title: Availability
availability.body: Choose a night to begin — we’ll confirm details personally. Available evenings glow softly in the calendar.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Share your dates and wishes — our concierge replies with a tailored proposal, quietly and without hurry.
contact.messageMin: A few more words help us prepare
contact.messageReq: Tell us how we can help
contact.successToast: Received — we’ll be in touch shortly.

cta.title: Your Florence chapter begins here
cta.body: Reserve Limonaia Villa Aurora — private gardens, curated interiors, and the city’s art within reach.

whatsapp.message: Hello, I'd like to get in touch.

meta.description: Limonaia Villa Aurora — a luxury private villa near Florence. Book your stay.
